caption: A person's hands, wearing a white wristband on the left arm, are shown working on a craft project on a light-colored cutting mat. The person is manipulating several strips of decorative paper featuring green leaf patterns and beige textured backgrounds. In the initial sequence, the hands hold two strips of paper vertically against other similar strips. Overlaid white text reads "BLOOM WHERE YOU'RE PLANTED" and "12" X 12" DESIGNER SERIES PAPER". In the background, there are crafting supplies, including clear acrylic blocks and red ink pads. A small piece of paper with the word "BIRTHDAY" is also visible. As the sequence progresses, the hands shift the positions of the green leaf strips, moving them horizontally across the beige strips to explore different arrangements. A small logo with a heart and the word " designs" appears in the lower-left corner of the frames.
